events.title: Iranian Counterair Campaign Targets US Aircraft in Saudi Arabia
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This marks a significant escalation in Iran's asymmetric counterair campaign against U.S. and Israeli operations in the region, demonstrating a growing capability to target high-value assets.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: Israeli Attacks on Gaza Continue, Causing Palestinian Casualties
events.desc: An early-morning Israeli strike hit a group of civilians in the Bureij camp, and drones attacked a tent in Khan Younis, resulting in at least seven Palestinian fatalities. These attacks underscore the ongoing lethal conflict in Gaza and the severe humanitarian toll.

events.title: Israeli Drone Attack Kills Palestinians Near Gaza Mosque
events.desc: An Israeli drone strike near a mosque in central Gaza resulted in the deaths of at least six Palestinians. This incident highlights the continued kinetic actions impacting civilian areas.

events.title: US Vice President Arrives in Pakistan for Talks with Iran
events.desc: U.S. Vice President JD Vance arrived in Islamabad for high-level talks with Iranian officials aimed at negotiating a ceasefire. The discussions are considered 'make or break' for halting weeks of fighting in the Middle East, with significant mistrust between the two sides.

events.title: Senior Iranian Officials Arrive in Pakistan for Ceasefire Talks
events.desc: Senior Iranian officials have arrived in Islamabad for ceasefire negotiations with the United States. These talks are crucial for de-escalating the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

events.title: US and Iran Set for Peace Talks Amid Doubts Over Lebanon and Sanctions
events.desc: The U.S. and Iran are scheduled to hold negotiations in Islamabad to end their six-week war. However, Tehran has indicated that talks cannot commence without commitments regarding a ceasefire in Lebanon and the lifting of sanctions, casting doubt on the proceedings.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and their associated passwords have been leaked online. This breach affects 12 out of 13 ministries, raising significant concerns about the security of sensitive and classified information.

events.title: Israeli Attacks Continue in Lebanon Despite Ceasefire Announcements
events.desc: Israel has rejected a ceasefire with Hezbollah and continued intensive bombing in Lebanon, including an expanded ground invasion in the south. This action follows an attack from Hezbollah and escalates the conflict in the region.

events.title: US Air Force Assets Targeted in Iranian Strikes
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry airborne command center and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This represents a significant development in Iran's asymmetric warfare strategy against U.S. regional capabilities.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: US-Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan Overshadowed by Mistrust
events.desc: Vice President JD Vance is in Islamabad for U.S.-Iran talks aimed at ending the Middle East war. The Pakistani Prime Minister has described the meeting as 'make or break.' However, deep mistrust and conflicting demands, particularly from Iran regarding Lebanon and sanctions, threaten the success of these negotiations.

events.title: US Scatterable Mines Allegedly Deployed Over Iranian Village
events.desc: Evidence suggests the U.S. deployed Gator Scatterable Mine systems over Kafari, a village near Shiraz, Iran, resulting in fatalities. Experts identified the munitions as U.S.-made Gator anti-tank mines.

events.title: Iran Faces Internet Blackout Amid Military Strikes
events.desc: During Israeli and American strikes, Iran's internet traffic collapsed by 98%, indicating a near-total government-imposed blackout. This action aimed to control information flow to the Iranian populace during the conflict.

events.title: Lebanon and Israel Officials to Meet in US for Talks
events.desc: Officials from Lebanon and Israel are scheduled to meet in Washington for talks. A senior Lebanese official stated that Lebanon would only participate if a ceasefire is in place, highlighting the fragile security situation.

events.title: Israeli Air Strikes in Beirut Result in Significant Casualties
events.desc: At least 182 people were killed and 890 wounded across Lebanon in a large wave of Israeli strikes, including attacks on the southern suburbs of Beirut. These strikes occurred hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

events.title: US Plans to Reopen Strait of Hormuz 'Fairly Soon'
events.desc: President Donald Trump stated that the U.S. intends to reopen the Strait of Hormuz 'fairly soon,' acknowledging that it will be a difficult process. He indicated that other countries are offering assistance.
